videos.headline: Jared Ivey's scoop and score secures the win for Ole Miss
videos.description: Jared Ivey recovers the fumble and finds pay dirt to seal the victory for Ole Miss.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jared Ivey's scoop and score secures the win for Ole Miss) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxson Dart connects with Tre Harris for an Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Tre Harris hauls in the dime from Jaxson Dart and takes it to the house to put the Rebels on the board first.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxson Dart connects with Tre Harris for an Ole Miss TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Makhi Hughes plows into the end zone for Tulane
videos.description: Makhi Hughes muscles past the goal line to tie the score at 7-7 for the Green Wave.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Makhi Hughes plows into the end zone for Tulane) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Horton fires a 31-yard strike to Jackson for a Tulane TD
videos.description: Jha'Quan Jackson snags the dime from Kai Horton to give the Green Wave a 17-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Horton fires a 31-yard strike to Jackson for a Tulane TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Quinshon Judkins finds pay dirt to tie the score for Ole Miss
videos.description: Quinshon Judkins dives across the goal line to tie the score at 17-17 in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Quinshon Judkins finds pay dirt to tie the score for Ole Miss) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaxon Dart uses legs to find Michael Trigg for an Ole Miss TD
videos.description: Jaxson Dart escapes the pocket and connects with Michael Trigg for a 21-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaxon Dart uses legs to find Michael Trigg for an Ole Miss TD) 2023/09/09 ESHEET
